note: First run -- no historical data for comparison. Baseline values established. Trend directions (MoM, QoQ, YoY) will be available after the next monthly run.

total_revenue.notes: Total invoiced revenue for Jan-Feb 2026. Jan: $78,676 invoiced, Feb: $57,881 invoiced. MoM within-period drop of 26.4%.

total_collected.notes: Cash received in period. Collection rate: 75.6% of invoiced amounts.

mrr_estimate.notes: Estimated MRR from 8 recurring clients: ACME, Atlas, BioK, CL001, Ennis, NewPath, Sealand, TAA.

gross_margin_pct.notes: Likely inflated -- time entries cover only ~3 weeks of the 2-month period while invoices cover the full period. True margins lower. Agency-wide gross margin from clients.json is 77.4%, which is more realistic.

net_margin_pct.notes: Same caveat as gross margin -- inflated due to partial time-entry data. Operating expenses: $2,260.65 for the period.

agency_gross_margin_pct.notes: From clients.json -- includes full cost data. Total revenue $219,254, total cost $49,478, profit $169,775.

dso_days.notes: DSO = (AR $35,865 / Revenue $219,254) x 61 days. Green threshold: < 30 days.

ar_over_60_days_pct.notes: No AR in 60+ day bucket. 3 overdue invoices exist but all < 60 days (13d, 11d, 5d overdue).

total_ar.notes: 5 outstanding sent invoices. All in current aging bucket.

billable_utilization_pct.notes: 615.7 billable hours out of 4,816 available hours across 14 team members. Critical underutilization.

total_utilization_pct.notes: 2,527.9 total tracked hours out of 4,816 available. 1,912.3 hours are non-billable.

client_count.notes: 14 clients with revenue, 6 additional with cost only (20 total active). 7 clients are unprofitable.

avg_revenue_per_client.notes: $219,254 / 14 revenue-generating clients. Top client Atlas Workwear at $46,636 (21.3%).

bench_cost.notes: 11 of 14 team members on bench (< 20% billable utilization). 3,536.5 bench hours at $50/hr.

concentration_risk_top_client_pct.notes: Atlas (ATLA) is 34.2% of invoiced revenue. Top 3 clients = 61.5%. High concentration risk.

agency_effective_rate.notes: Average effective bill rate per project hour across the agency.

within_period_trends.note: Significant within-period deterioration from January to February in both invoicing and collections.

insights: BASELINE ESTABLISHED: This is the first trend analysis run. All KPIs set as baseline values for future comparison.
REVENUE WITHIN-PERIOD DIP: February invoicing ($57,881) dropped 26.4% from January ($78,677). February collections ($29,900) dropped further -- only 51.7% collection rate vs January's 93.3%.

CRITICAL UTILIZATION: Billable utilization at 12.8% is far below healthy agency benchmarks (typically 60-75%). 11 of 14 team members are effectively on the bench. Bench cost of $176,825 is significant.
STRONG DSO: Days Sales Outstanding of 10 days is excellent. All AR is in the current bucket with 0% over 60 days.
CONCENTRATION RISK: Top client (Atlas) accounts for 34.2% of revenue. Top 3 clients represent 61.5%. Loss of any major client would materially impact the business.
7 UNPROFITABLE CLIENTS: Sealand, ACME, Stonz, Cowpokes, Organika, Fast Fix, and New Pro Container are consuming resources with negative or zero margins. Combined loss of $14,560.
LARGE UNBILLED PIPELINE: $482,175 in completed work has not been invoiced. Billing promptly would significantly improve cash position.
5 BUDGETS IN RED: New Pro Container has 3 overrun budgets (Discovery at 277% burn). Wire America Launch Support at 195% burn. Stonz at 162% burn.
STRONG PIPELINE: 90-day revenue forecast of $639,571 (expected scenario) shows a healthy committed backlog of $635,896.
3 OVERDUE INVOICES: $21,283 past due from TA (13 days), Ennis (11 days), and Elte (5 days). All expected to collect within 30 days.
next_run_note: After the next monthly snapshot (expected 2026-04-01), MoM changes will be calculated for all KPIs. QoQ trends available after 3 months of data. YoY after 12 months.
